items.title: AsgardBench: A benchmark for visually grounded interactive planning
items.content:
Imagine a robot tasked with cleaning a kitchen. It needs to observe its environment, decide what to do, and adjust when things don’t go as expected, for example, when the mug it was tasked to wash is already clean, or the sink is full of other items. This is the domain of embodied AI: systems […]

The post AsgardBench: A benchmark for visually grounded interactive planning appeared first on Microsoft Research.
items.contentSnippet:
Imagine a robot tasked with cleaning a kitchen. It needs to observe its environment, decide what to do, and adjust when things don’t go as expected, for example, when the mug it was tasked to wash is already clean, or the sink is full of other items. This is the domain of embodied AI: systems […]
The post AsgardBench: A benchmark for visually grounded interactive planning appeared first on Microsoft Research.
items.creator: Andrea Tupini, Lars Liden, Reuben Tan, Yu Wang, Jianfeng Gao
items.summary: AsgardBench是一个用于视觉引导交互式规划的基准测试。该基准测试旨在评估机器人在动态环境中执行任务的能力，例如清洁厨房时应对意外情况。它涵盖了具身AI领域，要求机器人观察环境、决策并调整行动。该基准测试由微软研究院发布，为交互式规划研究提供标准化的评估框架。

items.title: GroundedPlanBench: Spatially grounded long-horizon task planning for robot manipulation
items.content:
Vision-language models (VLMs) use images and text to plan robot actions, but they still struggle to decide what actions to take and where to take them. Most systems split these decisions into two steps: a VLM generates a plan in natural language, and a separate model translates it into executable actions. This approach often breaks […]

The post GroundedPlanBench: Spatially grounded long-horizon task planning for robot manipulation appeared first on Microsoft Research.
items.contentSnippet:
Vision-language models (VLMs) use images and text to plan robot actions, but they still struggle to decide what actions to take and where to take them. Most systems split these decisions into two steps: a VLM generates a plan in natural language, and a separate model translates it into executable actions. This approach often breaks […]
The post GroundedPlanBench: Spatially grounded long-horizon task planning for robot manipulation appeared first on Microsoft Research.
items.creator: Sehun Jung, HyunJee Song, Dong-Hee Kim, Reuben Tan, Jianfeng Gao, Yong Jae Lee, Donghyun Kim
items.summary: GroundedPlanBench提出了一种基于空间感知的长时程任务规划方法，用于机器人操作。该方法旨在解决当前视觉语言模型（VLMs）在决策行动和位置方面的不足。传统方法将决策分为生成自然语言计划和翻译为可执行行动两个步骤，但常导致问题。GroundedPlanBench通过整合空间信息，提升机器人长时程任务规划的准确性和效率。

items.title: Will machines ever be intelligent?
items.content:
Are machines truly intelligent? AI researchers Subutai Ahmad and Nicolò Fusi join Doug Burger to compare transformer-based AI with the human brain, exploring continual learning, efficiency, and whether today’s models are on a path toward human intelligence.

The post Will machines ever be intelligent?  appeared first on Microsoft Research.
items.contentSnippet:
Are machines truly intelligent? AI researchers Subutai Ahmad and Nicolò Fusi join Doug Burger to compare transformer-based AI with the human brain, exploring continual learning, efficiency, and whether today’s models are on a path toward human intelligence.
The post Will machines ever be intelligent?  appeared first on Microsoft Research.
items.creator: Doug Burger,  Subutai Ahmad, Nicolo Fusi
items.summary: 文章探讨了机器是否具备真正智能。微软研究院的研究人员Subutai Ahmad和Nicolò Fusi与Doug Burger比较了基于Transformer的AI与人类大脑，分析了持续学习、效率等问题，并探讨了当前AI模型是否正朝着人类智能的方向发展。

items.title: Systematic debugging for AI agents: Introducing the AgentRx framework
items.content:
As AI agents transition from simple chatbots to autonomous systems capable of managing cloud incidents, navigating complex web interfaces, and executing multi-step API workflows, a new challenge has emerged: transparency. When a human makes a mistake, we can usually trace the logic. But when an AI agent fails, perhaps by hallucinating a tool output or […]

The post Systematic debugging for AI agents: Introducing the AgentRx framework appeared first on Microsoft Research.
items.contentSnippet:
As AI agents transition from simple chatbots to autonomous systems capable of managing cloud incidents, navigating complex web interfaces, and executing multi-step API workflows, a new challenge has emerged: transparency. When a human makes a mistake, we can usually trace the logic. But when an AI agent fails, perhaps by hallucinating a tool output or […]
The post Systematic debugging for AI agents: Introducing the AgentRx framework appeared first on Microsoft Research.
items.creator: Shraddha Barke, Arnav Goyal, Alind Khare, Chetan Bansal
items.summary: AI代理从简单聊天机器人向自主系统发展，面临透明度挑战。人类犯错时易于追溯逻辑，但AI代理失败时，如幻觉工具输出，难以追踪。为解决此问题，微软研究院推出AgentRx框架，提供系统性调试方法，增强AI代理的可解释性和可靠性。

items.title: PlugMem: Transforming raw agent interactions into reusable knowledge
items.content:
It seems counterintuitive: giving AI agents more memory can make them less effective. As interaction logs accumulate, they grow large, fill with irrelevant content, and become increasingly difficult to use. More memory means that agents must search through larger volumes of past interactions to find information relevant to the current task. Without structure, these records mix […]

The post PlugMem: Transforming raw agent interactions into reusable knowledge appeared first on Microsoft Research.
items.contentSnippet:
It seems counterintuitive: giving AI agents more memory can make them less effective. As interaction logs accumulate, they grow large, fill with irrelevant content, and become increasingly difficult to use. More memory means that agents must search through larger volumes of past interactions to find information relevant to the current task. Without structure, these records mix […]
The post PlugMem: Transforming raw agent interactions into reusable knowledge appeared first on Microsoft Research.
items.creator: Ke Yang, Michel Galley, Chenglong Wang, Jianfeng Gao, Jiawei Han, ChengXiang Zhai
items.summary: PlugMem是一种技术，旨在将AI代理的原始交互记录转化为可重用的知识。文章指出，随着交互日志的积累，它们会变得庞大且充满无关内容，导致代理在搜索相关信息时效率降低。PlugMem通过结构化这些记录，帮助代理更有效地利用历史交互数据，从而提升任务处理能力。

items.title: Phi-4-reasoning-vision and the lessons of training a multimodal reasoning model
items.content:
We are pleased to announce Phi-4-reasoning-vision-15B, a 15 billion parameter open‑weight multimodal reasoning model, available through Microsoft Foundry (opens in new tab), HuggingFace (opens in new tab) and GitHub (opens in new tab). Phi-4-reasoning-vision-15B is a broadly capable model that can be used for a wide array of vision-language tasks such as image captioning, asking […]

The post Phi-4-reasoning-vision and the lessons of training a multimodal reasoning model appeared first on Microsoft Research.
items.contentSnippet:
We are pleased to announce Phi-4-reasoning-vision-15B, a 15 billion parameter open‑weight multimodal reasoning model, available through Microsoft Foundry (opens in new tab), HuggingFace (opens in new tab) and GitHub (opens in new tab). Phi-4-reasoning-vision-15B is a broadly capable model that can be used for a wide array of vision-language tasks such as image captioning, asking […]
The post Phi-4-reasoning-vision and the lessons of training a multimodal reasoning model appeared first on Microsoft Research.
items.creator: Jyoti Aneja, Michael Harrison, Neel Joshi, Tyler LaBonte, John Langford, Eduardo Salinas
items.summary: Phi-4-reasoning-vision-15B是一款15亿参数的开源多模态推理模型，可通过Microsoft Foundry、HuggingFace和GitHub获取。该模型具备广泛能力，适用于图像描述、视觉问答等多种视觉语言任务。文章还探讨了训练多模态推理模型的经验教训。

items.title: Trailer: The Shape of Things to Come
items.content:
Microsoft research lead Doug Burger introduces his new podcast series, "The Shape of Things to Come", an exploration into the fundamental truths about AI and how the technology will reshape the future.

The post Trailer: The Shape of Things to Come appeared first on Microsoft Research.
items.contentSnippet:
Microsoft research lead Doug Burger introduces his new podcast series, "The Shape of Things to Come", an exploration into the fundamental truths about AI and how the technology will reshape the future.  
The post Trailer: The Shape of Things to Come appeared first on Microsoft Research.
items.creator: Doug Burger
items.summary: 微软研究负责人Doug Burger推出新播客系列《The Shape of Things to Come》，探讨人工智能的基本真理及其对未来格局的重塑。该系列旨在深入分析AI技术发展趋势。

items.title: CORPGEN advances AI agents for real work
items.content:
By mid-morning, a typical knowledge worker is already juggling a client report, a budget spreadsheet, a slide deck, and an email backlog, all interdependent and all demanding attention at once. For AI agents to be genuinely useful in that environment, they will need to operate the same way, but today’s best models are evaluated one […]

The post CORPGEN advances AI agents for real work appeared first on Microsoft Research.
items.contentSnippet:
By mid-morning, a typical knowledge worker is already juggling a client report, a budget spreadsheet, a slide deck, and an email backlog, all interdependent and all demanding attention at once. For AI agents to be genuinely useful in that environment, they will need to operate the same way, but today’s best models are evaluated one […]
The post CORPGEN advances AI agents for real work appeared first on Microsoft Research.
items.creator: Abubakarr Jaye, Nigel Boachie Kumankumah, Chidera Biringa, Anjel Patel, Dayquan Julienne, Tianwei Chen, Sulaiman Vesal
items.summary:
文章标题：CORPGEN advances AI agents for real work

摘要：知识工作者常需同时处理多个相互关联的任务，如报告、预算、演示文稿和邮件。为使AI代理真正实用，需像人类一样高效协作。CORPGEN项目致力于改进AI代理，使其能在真实工作环境中无缝运作，但目前最佳模型仍存在评估局限。该项目旨在提升AI代理的实用性和效率，以应对复杂的工作需求。

items.title: Media Authenticity Methods in Practice: Capabilities, Limitations, and Directions
items.content:
As synthetic media grows, verifying what’s real, and the origin of content, matters more than ever. Our latest report explores media integrity and authentication methods, their limits, and practical paths toward trustworthy provenance across images, audio, and video.

The post Media Authenticity Methods in Practice: Capabilities, Limitations, and Directions appeared first on Microsoft Research.
items.contentSnippet:
As synthetic media grows, verifying what’s real, and the origin of content, matters more than ever. Our latest report explores media integrity and authentication methods, their limits, and practical paths toward trustworthy provenance across images, audio, and video.
The post Media Authenticity Methods in Practice: Capabilities, Limitations, and Directions appeared first on Microsoft Research.
items.creator: Eric Horvitz, Andrew Jenks, Jessica Young
items.summary: 文章探讨了媒体真实性与认证方法，分析了其在图像、音频和视频中的能力、局限及实践路径。随着合成媒体的增多，验证内容真实性和来源变得至关重要。报告旨在为建立可信溯源提供方向。

items.title: Project Silica’s advances in glass storage technology
items.content:
Project Silica introduces new techniques for encoding data in borosilicate glass, as described in the journal Nature. These advances lower media cost and simplify writing and reading systems while supporting 10,000-year data preservation.

The post Project Silica’s advances in glass storage technology appeared first on Microsoft Research.
items.contentSnippet:
Project Silica introduces new techniques for encoding data in borosilicate glass, as described in the journal Nature. These advances lower media cost and simplify writing and reading systems while supporting 10,000-year data preservation.
The post Project Silica’s advances in glass storage technology appeared first on Microsoft Research.
items.creator: Richard Black
items.summary: Project Silica通过在硼硅酸盐玻璃中编码数据，提升了玻璃存储技术。该技术发表于《自然》杂志，降低了存储介质成本，简化了读写系统，并支持数据保存长达10,000年。
